name: BsaI
source: Potapov 2018 ACS Synth Biol Table S1 (BsaI-HFv2, T4 ligase 37C); Score=on-target ligation freq

name: BsmBI
source: Potapov 2018 ACS Synth Biol Table S2 (BsmBI-v2, T4 ligase 42C); Score=on-target ligation freq

name: BbsI
source: REBASE recognition/cut. No on-target fidelity table bundled; engine uses functional unscored degrade. Spacer 'AA' provisional.

name: SapI
source: REBASE recognition/cut (3 nt overhang). No fidelity table bundled; functional unscored degrade. Spacer provisional.

name: PaqCI
source: REBASE recognition/cut (cuts 4/8 nt downstream). No fidelity table bundled; functional unscored degrade. Spacer 'AAAA' provisional.

name: BspMI
source: REBASE recognition/cut (cuts 4/8 nt downstream). No fidelity table bundled; functional unscored degrade. Spacer 'AAAA' provisional.
